Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-24 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong momentum performers ranking at the top of the 700+ ticker universe. TWIN leads with a composite score of 93.8 (rank 1), delivering 160.72% one-year returns while maintaining consistent ratio progression across all timeframes (4 ratio passes) and passing all SMA gates; notably, it outperforms SPY by 138.55% over the year and shows a strong 1.324 bad-day resilience score. LQDA ranks second with even more extreme returns at 469.68% one-year performance, though the data appears truncated; its 4.8 ratio on the 3-month leg stands out as unusually sharp growth acceleration compared to TWIN's more gradual 1.03-1.07 ratio progression. Both tickers trade above all major moving averages and show confirmed volatility flags, suggesting momentum is backed by volume expansion rather than thin-air rallies. The key differentiation is consistency: TWIN exhibits smoother, more predictable ratio scaling while LQDA shows a dramatic acceleration into the 3-month window, which may represent either explosive fundamental momentum or increased leverage of risk.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
